visuals.title: Mid-Point Circle Algorithm Decision Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Mid-Point Circle Algorithm Decision Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Circle Generation</text>
  <circle cx="100" cy="150" r="40" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">Center</text>
  <text x="100" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>Center
  </text>
  <text x="100" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">Radius</text>
  <text x="100" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>Radius
  </text>
  <line x1="100" y1="150" x2="250" y2="150" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <circle cx="250" cy="150" r="40" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="250" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">Circle</text>
  <text x="250" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>Circle
  </text>
</svg>

nodes.label:
Start at (x, y) = (0, r)
Calculate d = 3 - 2r

Choose E Pixel
x = x + 1
d = d + 4x + 6

Choose SE Pixel
x = x + 1
y = y - 1
d = d + 4(x - y) + 10
